source_pr.title: ddl: migrate test-infra to testify for ddl.testDBSuite6
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #32955

symptoms: // Test order by with primary key (ddl/db_test.go)
failure_signature: // Test order by with primary key (ddl/db_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates part of the DDL test suite from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify. Test-framework migration / suite refactor can stabilize suite lifecycle and reduce flakiness introduced by deprecated test frameworks.
fix_pattern: Migrate legacy gocheck-based DDL tests to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.

evidence: evidence: // Test order by with primary key (ddl/db_test.go)
